WHAT WE BUILD

Systems that replace the tool sprawl

💼

Custom CRM Systems

Stop paying per-seat SaaS fees for platforms that don't match your actual sales process. We build CRMs that map to how your team actually works — tracking leads, managing pipelines, and automating follow-ups without forcing you to change your workflow.

📈

Marketing & Lead Automation

Automated lead generation engines that capture, qualify, and route prospects to your sales team 24/7. Email drip campaigns, social integrations, and ad pipeline tracking — all wired together instead of scattered across five different tools.

📊

Business Intelligence Dashboards

Real-time operational visibility in one place. We consolidate sales metrics, inventory data, and operational KPIs into dashboards your managers actually use — replacing the end-of-month Excel report scramble with live, actionable data.

💬

WhatsApp & Tool Integration

Connect your existing tools into one operational flow. WhatsApp order capture, payment gateway hooks, ERP sync, and automated notifications — we wire together the systems you already run instead of asking you to replace everything.

INDUSTRIES

Where we excel

🏠

Real Estate & Construction

Lead capture pipelines, property management dashboards, and automated client communication tools for developers and agencies managing hundreds of prospects across multiple projects.

✓ Lead Funnels
✓ CRM Integration
✓ Site Visit Booking
✓ WhatsApp Follow-ups
🛍️

Retail & Consumer

Omnichannel POS integrations, inventory tracking, and loyalty programs for retail businesses scaling from one location to many without multiplying their operational headcount.

✓ Inventory Sync
✓ Loyalty Programs
✓ E-Commerce Integrations
✓ Sales Dashboards
🛠️

Home & Local Services

Job scheduling, automated invoicing, and field team tracking for service businesses where the back-office work grows faster than the team doing it.

✓ Job Scheduling
✓ Automated Invoicing
✓ Field Tracking
✓ Review Automation

Ready to replace the tool sprawl?

Book a scoping call. We'll map your current systems, identify the highest-impact automation targets, and give you a fixed-price proposal within a week.
